headline: Tech Bosses Tell Trump They’ll Pay Up for Electricity
summary: Big Tech’s decision to foot more of the electricity bill has begun to benefit companies that provide power and their stocks.

headline: Jim Cramer Notes “Cummins Is Seeing Incredible Demand for Diesel Backup Generators From All These New Data Centers”
summary: Cummins Inc. (NYSE:CMI) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer looked at. Cramer mentioned the company during the episode and commented: What do we do with the stock of Cummins, the maker of truck engines and power generators? It’s up 47% in the past six months, nearly 14% year to date. Right now, the story […]
